## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] Migrations are backward-compatible (no destructive changes)
- [ ] New service objects return `Success` / `Failure` (dry-monads)
- [ ] New controller actions have Pundit `authorize` calls
- [ ] i18n keys added for any user-facing strings
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
